channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: 2 predawn explosions rock the area around the Israeli Embassy in Copenhagen but no one is injured
item.description: COPENHAGEN, Denmark (AP) — Police in the Danish capital said two predawn explosions occurred Wednesday in the vicinity of the Israeli Embassy in Copenhagen, prompting a nearby Jewish school to close for the day. Three men were later arrested.
item.dc:creator: JAN M. OLSEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 11 workers at a Tennessee factory were swept away in Hurricane Helene flooding. Only 5 were rescued
item.description: As the rain from Hurricane Helene came down harder and harder, workers inside a plastics factory in rural Tennessee kept working. It wasn’t until water flooded into the parking lot and the power went out that the plant shut down and sent workers home. Several never made it.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Israel's multilayered air-defense system passes another test in fending off Iranian missile strike
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Israel's multilayered air-defense system appears to have passed another test after fending off Iran's latest missile barrage. In Tuesday's night's strike, Iran fired over 180 missiles toward Israel.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Vance and Walz give voters drastically different vision for America during VP debate and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cadaver dogs wade through muck of communities 'wiped off the map' by Helene
item.description: Cadaver dogs and search crews trudged through knee-deep muck and debris in the mountains of western North Carolina
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dad treks miles through Hurricane Helene aftermath to walk daughter down aisle on her wedding day
item.description: A father's love knew no boundaries over the weekend as he walked nearly 30 miles through flood debris in South Carolina to Tennessee to walk his daughter down the aisle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Helene's death toll surpasses 150 as crews continue to search for survivors
item.description: Exhausted emergency workers continued to work around-the-clock to clear roads, restore power and cellphone service, and reach people left stranded by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: US 'Welcome Corps' helps resettle LGBTQ+ refugees fleeing crackdowns against gay people
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Cabrel Ngounou's life in Cameroon quickly unraveled after neighbors caught the teenager with his boyfriend. A crowd surrounded his boyfriend's house and beat him. Ngounou's family learned of the relationship and kicked him out.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and TERRY CHEA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Push to map Great Lakes bottom gains momentum amid promises effort will help fishing and shipping
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Jennifer Boehme grew up scouting beaches around her home in St. Petersburg, Florida, for whatever she could find. Rocks, sand dollars, coquina mollusks — anything the ocean gave up. Now, 40 years later, Boehme wants to launch another treasure hunt.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Clues that could have helped solve the Texas Killing Fields murders in an all-new episode of ‘The Evidence Room’
item.description: A new episode of the KPRC 2 Investigates true crime docuseries 'The Evidence Room' premieres Wednesday at 6:30 p.m. exclusively on the KPRC 2+ livestream.
item.dc:creator: Robert Arnold, Tiffani Lupenski, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris and Biden are fanning out across the Southeast as devastation from Helene grows
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Over the last four years, President Joe Biden has jetted off to survey damage and console victims after tornadoes, wildfires and tropical storms. It's not a role that Kamala Harris has played as vice president.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pennsylvania town grapples with Trump assassination attempt ahead of his return
item.description: Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump is returning this weekend to the town where an assassin's bullet grazed his ear in July.
item.dc:creator: Mark Scolforo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WWII destroyer found off California coast 76 years later
item.description: A surviving ship from WWII that was used by both Allied and Axis forces in the Pacific and that was given a ceremonial burial at sea has finally been located after more than seven decades underwater.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Nobert, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The US could see shortages and higher retail prices if a dockworkers strike drags on
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. ports from Maine to Texas shut down Tuesday when the union representing about 45,000 dockworkers went on strike for the first time since 1977. Workers began walking picket lines early Tuesday, picketing near ports all along the East Coast.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON and ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Education a potential flashpoint in Vance-Walz vice presidential debate
item.description: Education hardly came up in last month’s Trump-Harris presidential debate, but it could be a central focus at Tuesday’s undercard event.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Iran fires at least 180 missiles into Israel as regionwide conflict grows
item.description: Iran launched at least 180 missiles into Israel on Tuesday, the latest in a series of escalating attacks in a yearslong conflict between Israel and Iran and its Arab allies that threatens to push the Middle East closer toward a regionwide war.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump suggests ‘1 rough hour’ of policing would end retail crime
item.description: The former president called for law enforcement to be freed up to "do their job" without restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: iPhone stuck in SOS mode? Here's how to get out of it
item.description: There are ongoing reports of a widespread outage impacting multiple cellphone and internet providers Monday morning. According to Downdetector.com, AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile users have all experienced issues.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, ABC 4

item.title: These are the 50 best school districts in America for 2025, report finds
item.description: Choosing where to live could come down to the strength of the school district for many parents, and a new study ranks the top 50 in the nation.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: iPhone stuck in SOS mode? Here's how to get out of it
item.description: There are ongoing reports of a widespread outage impacting multiple cellphone and internet providers Monday morning. According to Downdetector.com, AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile users have all experienced issues.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: A dockworkers strike could shut down Port Tampa Bay. Will it affect holiday shopping?
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. ports from Maine to Texas could shut down if a union representing about 45,000 dockworkers carries through with a threatened strike early Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON and ANNE D'INNOCENZIO AP Business Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DirecTV buys rival Dish TV and Sling for just $1
item.description: DirecTV is buying Dish and Sling, a deal it has sought to complete for years, as the company seeks to better compete against streaming services that have become dominant.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump suspect pleads not guilty in attempted assassination
item.description: The man accused of attempting to assassinate former President Trump at one of his Florida golf courses earlier this month has pleaded not guilty to five federal charges, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Helene's death toll rises to more than 100 as supplies rushed to isolated communities
item.description: A crisis unfolded in Asheville, North Carolina, as officials pledged to get more water, food and other supplies to flood-stricken areas without power and cellular service Monday, days after Hurricane Helene ripped across the U.S. Southeast. The death toll from the storm surpassed 100.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Maya Rudolph as Harris and Dana Carvey as Biden open the 50th season of 'Saturday Night Live'
item.description: “Saturday Night Live” began its 50th season with a parade of former co-stars, including Maya Rudolph as Vice President Kamala Harris, Andy Samberg as her husband Doug Emhoff and Dana Carvey as President Joe Biden.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kris Kristofferson, singer-songwriter and actor, dies at 88
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kris Kristofferson, a Rhodes scholar with a deft writing style and rough charisma who became a country music superstar and an A-list Hollywood actor, has died. Kristofferson died at his home on Maui, Hawaii, on Saturday, family spokeswoman Ebie McFarland said in an email.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON and KRISTIN M. HALL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Lawmakers fear 'chaos' if Trump-Harris race goes to the wire
item.description: Lawmakers in both parties are bracing themselves for a messy aftermath to Election Day as polls show the race between former President Trump and Vice President Harris is so close in several battleground states that it could take days to determine the winner.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Supplies arrive by plane and mule as Helene death toll passes 100
item.description: Desperate residents isolated by washed-out roads and the lack of power and cellular service in western North Carolina lined up Monday for fresh water and a chance to message loved ones that they were alive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: John Ashton of 'Beverly Hills Cop' dies at 76
item.description: In a career that spanned more than 50 years, Ashton was a regular face across TV series and films, including "Midnight Run,” “Little Big League” and “Gone Baby Gone.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Harris trolls Trump at Vegas rally and LA fundraiser, says her crowds are 'pretty big'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris poked at Donald Trump over crowd sizes, his refusal to debate again and his privileged background on Sunday as she hauled in campaign cash in California and held a raucous rally at the same Nevada venue where the Republican nominee had appeared just two
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Henry runs for 199 yards and Jackson has 3 TDs as Ravens rout previously unbeaten Bills 35-10
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Derrick Henry was off and running from the first time he touched the ball. There was no way the Buffalo Bills were stopping the Baltimore Ravens after that.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Here are the top 10 states where you're likely to find gold: survey
item.description: According to a survey conducted by SD Bullion, Colorado remains the seventh-highest gold-producing state in the United States even in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: Death toll rises from Helene while supplies are rushed to North Carolina and Florida digs out
item.description: PERRY, Fla. (AP) — Authorities struggled to get water and other supplies to isolated, flood-stricken areas across the U.S. Southeast in the wake of Hurricane Helene as the death toll from the storm rose to nearly 100.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, JEFFREY COLLINS and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: This Halloween decoration can be dangerous for deer, wildlife officials warn
item.description: Fall is in full swing and many have already decked out their properties with Halloween decorations, but wildlife experts say that one decoration in particular can be harmful to deer in the area.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump tosses chicken tenders into crowd at college football game
item.description: Former President Donald Trump surprised college students on Saturday in Alabama with an unusual gift for football fans.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dunkin' is giving out free coffee for National Coffee Day
item.description: Happy National Coffee day to all of those who need a caffeine kick in the mornings. If you're still searching for your fix on Sunday morning, look no further than Dunkin'. The popular coffee and donut chain is giving out free coffee to its reward members in celebration of National Coffee Day.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: SpaceX launches rescue mission for 2 NASA astronauts who are stuck in space until next year
item.description: SpaceX launched a rescue mission for the two stuck astronauts at the International Space Station on Saturday, sending up a downsized crew to bring them home but not until next year.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, WGN 9
